headline: Planting Equipment Market to Reach $29.44 Billion by 2031, Driven by Digital Agronomy Innovations
summary: The global planting equipment market is forecasted to grow from USD 21.74 billion in 2026 to USD 29.44 billion by 2031, driven by advancements in digital agronomy tools and precision agriculture, achieving a CAGR of 6.3%. Leading companies like Yara International are utilizing digital solutions to enhance crop yields. With opportunities for both farmers and manufacturers, the industry is aligned with precision agriculture trends, focusing on higher crop yields and resource efficiency. The market
